creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
NetAddrIP needs update to 4.007 to fix latency problems
  Expecially with Mail::SPF
  See http://search.cpan.org/src/LUISMUNOZ/NetAddr-IP-4.007/Changes
  (I need it as the port maintainer of p5-Mail-SpamAssassin for SA 
3.2.1, thanks!)

Fix: These patches fix it: nothing else seems to be needed

PORTNAME=      NetAddr-IP
-PORTVERSION=   4.00.4
+PORTVERSION=   4.00.7
 CATEGORIES=    net-mgmt perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ../../authors/id/L/LU/LUISMUNOZ
How-To-Repeat:   na
